chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 928 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.3966/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 16.08.2023 Syed Suhail Hussain Shah Rizvi, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, DAG for Pakistan >>>>>>>...<<<<<<< After arguing the matter at some length, when we confronted the petitioners’ Counsel as to why petitioners did not approach the Election Tribunal for redressal of their grievances, he submits that they filed an Appeal / petition but the Clerk of the Election Tribunal refused to receive the same on the ground that it was barred by time, hence, they filed this petition. We are not satisfied with such argument, but in any case let the petitioners file an Appeal / Petition before the Election Tribunal and if it is time barred, the Election Tribunal shall dispose it of through a speaking order and shall not refuse to entertain the Appeal / Petition, in any case. In view of above, the Counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
